mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_customer_service_message ( session_id, sender_id, sender_name, sender_role, receiver_id, message_type, content, is_read, create_time ) VALUES ( #{sessionId, jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{senderId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{senderName, jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{senderRole, jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{receiverId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{messageType, jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{content, jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{isRead, jdbcType=INTEGER}, GETDATE() )
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_customer_service_message WHERE receiver_id = #{receiverId, jdbcType=BIGINT} AND is_read = 0
SELECT DISTINCT session_id FROM tb_customer_service_message ORDER BY session_id
